name: read-files
description: Read multiple files or find+grep with line range, head, tail, brief, grep-with-context, line counting, numbering, directory listing, find-by-name, and filtering.

parameters.name: files
parameters.description: One or more file or directory paths (optional with --find-name)

parameters.name: --dir=DIR
parameters.description: Working directory to cd into first

parameters.name: --head=N
parameters.description: Show first N lines only

parameters.name: --tail=N
parameters.description: Show last N lines only

parameters.name: --lines=START-END
parameters.description: Show line range START through END (repeatable)

parameters.name: --brief=NUMS
parameters.description: Show only specific line numbers/ranges like 3,5,10-15

parameters.name: --grep=PATTERN
parameters.description: Search file or directory contents for pattern

parameters.name: --grep-context=N
parameters.description: Show N lines of context before/after each grep match

parameters.name: --include=GLOB
parameters.description: File glob filter for directory grep, like --include=*.ts

parameters.name: --exclude=PATTERN
parameters.description: Exclude path pattern for directory grep

parameters.name: --count
parameters.description: Show line count(s) instead of file content

parameters.name: --number
parameters.description: Prefix lines with original line numbers

parameters.name: --ls
parameters.description: List directory contents instead of reading files

parameters.name: --find-name=PATTERN
parameters.description: Find files by name glob before reading/grepping (repeatable for multiple patterns like --find-name=*.js --find-name=*.ts)

parameters.name: --find-type=f|d
parameters.description: Find type f(file) or d(directory), default f

parameters.name: --max-depth=N
parameters.description: Max directory depth for find or grep

parameters.name: --limit=N
parameters.description: Max results for find mode, default 100

parameters.name: --find-exclude=PATTERN
parameters.description: Exclude path pattern for find mode

parameters.name: --find-ignore-case
parameters.description: Case-insensitive find by name

parameters.name: --names-only
parameters.description: List filenames only (for grep mode)

parameters.name: --ignore-case
parameters.description: Case-insensitive grep

parameters.name: --exclude-dir=PATTERN
parameters.description: Exclude dirs from grep, comma-separated

parameters.name: --exclude-pattern=PATTERN
parameters.description: Exclude matching grep lines

examples.expected: 5 lines of context around each match of 'create_app' in server.py and recursively in /app

cost_saving_rationale: Collapses dozens of separate cat/head/tail/sed/nl/ls/wc/grep/find calls into one step, saving N-1 steps per batch.
